channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WATCH: Cubs manager Craig Counsell goes 1-on-1 with GN Sports from spring training
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — All baseball seasons are a roller-coaster ride to some degree, but Craig Counsell's first season as manager of the Cubs was especially up and down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: The All-Star break is almost over. It's time for the stretch run toward the NBA playoffs
item.description: The trade deadline is gone. The All-Star break is about to end. Luka Doncic is with the Los Angeles Lakers.Jimmy Butler is with the Golden State Warriors. Anthony Davis is with the Dallas Mavericks, though it's unknown when he'll play again. The dust has settled. It's time for the stretch run.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Yankees' Stanton hasn't swung bat in 3 or 4 weeks and is unsure of whether he can play in opener
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New York Yankees slugger Giancarlo Stanton hasn't swung a bat in three or four weeks and isn't sure whether he will be ready for opening day because of painful tendinitis in both elbows.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaw performs Black Power salute after goal for Man City Women following racist abuse
item.description: Khadija ‘Bunny’ Shaw has bowed her head and raised a gloved fist after scoring a goal on her first start for Manchester City Women since pulling out of the team because of racist abuse directed at her on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that up into the air, too, in a fitting finish to his All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The All-Star verdicts are in, and the player reaction to the mini-tournament is mixed
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The verdicts were mixed, as would be expected. The NBA's All-Star Game mini-tournament is now complete, Shaq's OGs getting the win in the four-team, three-game event where the first squad to score 40 points in each game got the victory. Some players liked it. Some didn't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Dolphins lineman Jonathan Martin walks back bullying allegations against teammate that caused NFL scandal
item.description: In 2013, ex-Miami Dolphins lineman Jonathan Martin accused teammate Richie Incognito of bullying. 12 years later, he's walking back those comments that led to NFL scandal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mavericks coach Darrell Armstrong arrested on aggravated assault charge
item.description: Dallas Mavericks assistant coach Darrell Armstrong was arrested and charged with aggravated assault after allegedly hitting his girlfriend in the face with a pistol on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Liverpool continues Premier League title charge and Man United's season keeps getting worse
item.description: Liverpool continued its charge toward the Premier League title on Sunday with a 2-1 win against Wolverhampton. For Manchester United, it just keeps getting worse after a 1-0 loss at Tottenham. The fortunes of England’s two most successful teams could hardly be more contrasting.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seven more massage therapists accuse Ravens' Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: report
item.description: A total of 16 massage therapists from eight Baltimore-area spas have now shared accounts with the Baltimore Banner.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 7 more massage therapists accuse Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: Report
item.description: Seven more massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, the Baltimore Banner reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nolan Arenado reports to camp after the Cardinals tried to trade him in the offseason
item.description: JUPITER, Fla. (AP) — St. Louis Cardinals third baseman Nolan Arenado reported to spring training on Sunday, showing up to play for a team that spent much of the offseason trying to trade him. The eight-time All-Star and 10-time Gold Glove winner is owed $74 million for the next three seasons.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes stun #17 Kansas, 74-67
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 24 points and became Utah's career leader in made 3-pointers as the Utes beat No. 17 Kansas 74-67 on Saturday night. Madsen's fifth and final 3-pointer of the game with 1:58 to play gave him the Utah career record of 288 made 3s.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU rolls past Kansas State, 80-65
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored 17 points and grabbed 14 rebounds on Saturday night to help BYU beat Kansas State 80-65 and snap the Wildcats' six-game win streak. Dallin Hall scored 16 points and Fousseyni Traore 11 for BYU (17-8, 8-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former White Sox All-Star, World Series Champion Bobby Jenks undergoing stomach cancer treatment
item.description: Bobby Jenks, a two-time All-Star closer and World Series champion with the Chicago White Sox, is being treated for stomach cancer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Avid volunteer enjoys first Genesis Invitational
item.description: Jenny Liu has volunteered at Torrey Pines for 24 years. She’s seen a lot in her time, but this week it was her first experience with the Genesis Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Suzuki and Counsell are working on their communication in spring training with the Cubs
item.description: MESA, Ariz. (AP) — Seiya Suzuki is working on his communication with Craig Counsell, and the manager says it's his fault. Suzuki joined the rest of the Chicago Cubs for their first full-squad workout of spring training on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UCSD student gets the job of a lifetime at Genesis Invitational
item.description: Ruth Nguyen, an 18-year-old student at UCSD, earned the opportunity to announce the names of golf stars at The Genesis Invitational through the TGR Foundation, founded by Tiger Woods, and its Earl Woods Scholarship program.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Study finds Bears fans most heartbroken in the NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — In Chicago, sports and heartbreak go hand-in-hand. The Bears just went 5-12 when ahead of the season, they had playoff aspirations. The Bulls are fresh off back-to-back demolitions from the Detroit Pistons and embarking on a rebuild heading into the NBA all-star break.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 schedule of events
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star weekend gets underway Friday with games, events and activations set to take place in and around San Francisco for the next several days.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 48, The Bishop's School 37
item.description: A big time coastal league matchup between SFC and Bishop's in boys basketball. The last time these 2 teams faced off the SFC Eagles won by just 2 points.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: De Beque's Burke Largent scores 1,000th point as Dragon fans go crazy at Caprock
item.description: As Largent eclipsed the 1K mark on a tough bucket over three defenders, the scores of royal blue in the Caprock stands went absolutely berserk.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Avery Neff makes stunning recovery from ankle injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Back January 17th, the #1 gymnastics recruit in the country, freshman Avery Neff was sailing along in her floor routine until her ankle buckled. The Huntsman Center went quiet as Neff had to be carried off the mat. Even she thought her season was over.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
